Patrick R. Campbell of BRAYTON PURCELL LLP (415.898.1555), appearing for plaintiffs/moving parties Plaintiffs Erik McKee, Kenya McKee, and Carolyn McKee as Wrongful Death Heirs of Benjamin McKee, Deceased.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

There being no other appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling: Plaintiffs' motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
